prompt: Create a surreal high-fashion western editorial photograph of a stylish Black cowboy riding a dapple gray horse, framed from a low slightly upward angle so the rider fills the left-center and the horse’s head dominates the right side of the image. The rider wears a wide black cowboy hat, abundant gold jewelry and rings, and a dramatic shaggy faux-fur coat in red, pink, and pale lavender, holding brown leather reins with one hand while lifting a black-and-white mug to their mouth with the other. Their face is intentionally obscured by a simple soft-edged rectangular blur in warm brown tones. Add a large cloud of pink smoke drifting behind the rider across a vivid deep blue sky, with hints of low mountains or desert horizon at the bottom. Use saturated cinematic color grading, glossy fashion-magazine lighting, sharp detail on the horse’s fur and bridle, tactile texture on the shaggy coat, rich contrast, dreamy surreal mood, and a square-to-4:3 editorial composition.
